message:
test(blob-leases): expand from 43 to 62 tests for blob lease and manager (wa-22x6q)

Add 19 new tests across two previously untested modules:

manager.rs (+10): store/get roundtrip, empty/large data, content ID dedup,
get_by_content_id success/failure, storage-not-initialized error paths.

lease.rs (+9): BlobLease get_data, get_reader, content_id, clone equality,
Debug formatting, drop safety with/without storage, storage-removed error.

Note: these tests require --test-threads=1 due to shared global STORAGE.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
